sourcesContent: import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; import { Router } from '@angular/router'; import { AuthService } from './core/services/auth.service'; @Component({ selector: 'app-root', templateUrl: './app.component.html', styleUrls: ['./app.component.css'] }) export class AppComponent implements OnInit { title = 'sponsorship-ui'; isSidebarCollapsed = false; isLoggedIn = false; constructor( private authService: AuthService, private router: Router ) {} ngOnInit() { this.authService.currentUser$.subscribe(user => { this.isLoggedIn = !!user; }); } toggleSidebar() { this.isSidebarCollapsed = !this.isSidebarCollapsed; } }
